overview: A clean, light-themed bike spare parts discovery platform. Search and filter by brand or part category to find nearby shops selling the exact parts you need, with smooth animations and a fully interactive experience.
features: Real-time search across bike parts by name
Brand tabs for KTM, Honda, Bajaj, Yamaha with active filtering
Category chips (Brakes, Engine, Chain, Tyres, Accessories) with toggle selection
Product grid with real images, price in ₹, stock status, and distance
Product detail modal with seller info and action buttons
Page load staggered animations and scroll-triggered reveal
Smooth hover and filter transition effects
